data.title: A whale deposited 4.33 million USDC into Hyperliquid and bought 130,715 HYPE
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to OnChain Lens monitoring, a whale deposited 4.33 million USDC into Hyperliquid and bought 130,715 HYPE at an average price of $1.8. The whale also holds a long position in WLD with 2x leverage, and currently has a floating profit of $200,000.

data.title: Analysis: Trump's tariff threat caused volatility in the crypto market, and 24-hour long positions have exceeded $500 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: The crypto market has experienced violent fluctuations due to the news that former US President Trump announced that he would impose a 50% tariff on EU imports and a 25% tariff on Apple iPhones. The rapid decline in Bitcoin price from above $111,000 has caused turbulent sentiment in the crypto market.
Coinglass data shows that the total amount of cryptocurrency long positions liquidated in the past 24 hours has exceeded US$500 million, with Bitcoin futures liquidating approximately US$182 million and Ethereum futures liquidating nearly US$142 million. Analysts believe that the pullback occurred at a time when Bitcoin was gaining momentum due to ETF inflows and rising institutional interest, highlighting the significant impact of macro policy changes on the crypto market. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Cetus Hack Exploits Overflow Vulnerability, Resulting in $230 Million Loss
data.description:
According to Odaily, a detailed analysis by SlowMist has revealed the mechanics behind the recent $230 million theft from Cetus. The attack centered on the exploitation of an overflow vulnerability in the get_delta_a function, specifically bypassing the checked_shlw overflow detection. This allowed the attacker to manipulate parameters, causing the system to miscalculate the required amount of haSUI tokens. As a result, the attacker was able to exchange a minimal amount of tokens for a substantial amount of liquidity assets.

The incident highlights the potential impact of mathematical overflow vulnerabilities. By carefully selecting specific parameters and exploiting the flaw in the checked_shlw function, the attacker managed to obtain liquidity worth billions with just one token. This sophisticated mathematical attack underscores the importance of rigorously validating boundary conditions in all mathematical functions during smart contract development.

data.title: Binance Launches Orbiter Finance Trading Competition on Binance Alpha Platform
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Binance launched the Binance Alpha platform Orbiter Finance trading competition. Using the Binance wallet (keyless) or Binance Alpha platform to trade OBT can win exclusive token rewards. All users who meet the Binance Alpha token trading qualifications can participate in this trading competition. Binance will rank participants based on their total purchases on the OBT platform. During the event, the top 6,000 users in terms of OBT purchases will share 50,000,000 OBT (8,333 OBT per user).
Event time: 08:00 (UTC) on May 24, 2025 to 08:00 (UTC) on June 7, 2025

data.title: SlowMist releases analysis of the $230 million Cetus theft: hackers used a very small amount of tokens to exchange for huge amounts of liquid assets
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News SlowMist released an analysis of the $230 million theft of Cetus, which pointed out that the core of this incident was that the attacker carefully constructed parameters to cause overflow but bypass detection, and finally exchanged a huge amount of liquid assets with a very small amount of tokens. The core reason is that there is an overflow detection bypass vulnerability in checked_shlw in the get_delta_a function. The attacker took advantage of this and caused the system to have a serious deviation in calculating how much haSUI actually needed to be added. Because the overflow was not detected, the system misjudged the number of haSUI required, resulting in the attacker only needing a few tokens to exchange a large amount of liquid assets, thus realizing the attack.
This attack demonstrates the power of mathematical overflow vulnerabilities. The attacker selected specific parameters through precise calculations and exploited the defects of the checked_shlw function to obtain billions of liquidity at the cost of 1 token. This is an extremely sophisticated mathematical attack, and developers are advised to strictly verify the boundary conditions of all mathematical functions in smart contract development.

data.title: Yield Guild Games: YGG Token Now Available on Abstract
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, the blockchain game guild Yield Guild Games announced that the YGG token has been launched on the Ethereum Layer 2 blockchain Abstract, supporting users to exchange YGG tokens for other tokens such as PENGU through the YGG/ETH trading pair on Abstract Global Wallet and Uniswap. In addition to the Abstract blockchain, other blockchains currently supported by YGG include Base, Ethereum, Polygon, Ronin and BNB Chain.

data.description:

Speaking on his show Mad Money, Jim pointed out that Trump’s trade orders are damaging both Nvidia and Apple, and he warned that investors are underestimating just how much the White […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/jim-cramer-trump-trying-to-control-big-tech/

data.title: SuiLend Prioritizes Security and Transparency in DeFi Lending
data.description:
According to Odaily, SuiLend, a DeFi lending service within the Sui ecosystem, emphasized its commitment to user safety and protocol integrity on the X platform. The company, along with SpringSui and STEAMM, assured users that their funds are protected from smart contract vulnerabilities. To enhance transparency, SuiLend has released third-party audit reports and open-sourced its code.

Previously, reports indicated that a hacker associated with Cetus had deposited $10 million worth of SUI assets into SuiLend, potentially with the intention of borrowing stablecoins.

data.title: Bitcoin treasury companies will hold 'way more' than Bitcoiners expect: Exec
data.description:
Moon Inc. head of Bitcoin strategy Jesse Myers says that Bitcoin holders are underestimating the significant amount of Bitcoin that corporations will accumulate by 2045. “Bitcoin Treasury Companies will hold 50% of all BTC, way more than most Bitcoiners are prepared for,” Jesse Myers said in a May 23 X thread. Strategy will own $70T of Bitcoin by 2025, says MyersMyers further forecasted that Michael Saylor’s Strategy will own $70 trillion worth of Bitcoin (BTC) by 2045, “making it by far the most valuable company in the history of the world
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-treasury-companies-significant-holdings-forecast-btc-jesse-myers?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: US eases Syria sanctions imposed after Assad’s fall to rebel forces
data.description:
The United States has started lifting some of the longest-standing sanctions on Syria, after President Donald Trump met with the country’s new leader, Ahmed Al-Sharaa, in Saudi Arabia last week. The Treasury Department made the move official on Friday, labeling it “immediate sanctions relief. ” These were sanctions originally enforced during the Assad dictatorship, which collapsed […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trump-us-eases-syria-sanctions/

Glassnode: ETH investor cost basis level is in the $2,800 range, and selling pressure is gradually increasing
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: On-chain analysis platform Glassnode posted on the X platform that the current investor cost basis level of ETH is in the $2,800 range. As prices approach this area, seller pressure may increase, as many holders who were previously at a loss may seek to reduce their positions near the break-even point.

data.title: Polygon Co-Founder Mihailo Bjelic Exits Layer 2
data.description:
Mihailo Bjelic, one of the four co-founders of Polygon, is exiting the network.Bjelic made the announcement on X, "After much thought and reflection, I’ve decided to step down from the board of the Polygon Foundation, and wind down my day-to-day involvement with Polygon Labs," he said.With Bjelic's exit, co-founder Sandeep Nailwal becomes the last remaining member of the original founding team.Nailwal acknowledged Bjelic's contributions to the network and wished him luck for the future
source: https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2025/05/24/polygon-co-founder-mihailo-bjelic-exits-layer-2

data.title: Decentralized Stablecoin Funding Marketplace Hyperdrive Completes $6 Million Series A Funding, Led by Hack VC and Arrington Capital
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Hyperdrive, a decentralized stablecoin funding market based on Hyperliquid, announced the completion of a $6 million Series A financing round, led by Hack VC and Arrington Capital, with participation from Delphi Ventures, Proof Group, SIG, Caladan Group, Amber Group, CMS Holdings, Breed VC and several angel investors. The project aims to build a stablecoin money market and yield hub on the Hyperliquid blockchain, providing stablecoin deposits and loans, liquid pledge $HYPE and one-click yield strategies.
